title: Blizzard
description: A fun challenge, which will freeze your world. Stay in the light to stay warm! (START WITH A LIGHT SOURCE LIKE A BONUS CHEST)
body:
This mod is a fun challenge, which will create a blizzard storm and freeze your world. You will gradually get colder and start taking freezing damage, unless you warm yourself up with block light sources, like a torch, or lava.

Some Features: There is custom snow generation, which will pile up infinitely. All trees will decay and die. All overworld and end mobs will become buffed versions of strays.

Can you survive the harsh winter?

Video Preview:
[https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=fhWoA3wt1Zs](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=fhWoA3wt1Zs)
